hero.name: Alex Seeto
hero.title: Web Designer & Developer
hero.subtitle: Assistant Director of Software Engineering
hero.tagline: Transforming ideas into clean, functional, and artful web experiences.
hero.bio: I'm a web designer and developer with years of experience building scalable software and leading engineering teams. As Assistant Director of Software Engineering, I combine strategic thinking with hands-on development to deliver high-quality, functional digital experiences. In addition to my leadership role, I apply the same attention to detail, design sensibility, and technical expertise to web development projects for small businesses and startups. I specialize in minimalistic, mobile-responsive, and visually compelling web projects that balance aesthetics and usability.
